hook: Confidence deepens when your private standards are stronger than your need for immediate approval.
body: If approval decides your behavior, you will feel unstable around anyone you find attractive.

hook: Many men borrow their emotional weather from whatever signal they last received.
body: Build an inner scoreboard that tracks honesty, restraint, courage, and follow-through.

hook: Build an inner scoreboard that tracks honesty, restraint, courage, and follow-through.
body: Walking away cleanly from low reciprocity often builds more confidence than squeezing out one more half-interested reply.

hook: Walking away cleanly from low reciprocity often builds more confidence than squeezing out one more half-interested reply.
body: Define your own score for a good interaction before you enter it, so someone else's mood does not define the whole event.
